ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assemblies" (
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly */,
  "assembly_file_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the assembly was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the assembly */,
  "programming_language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the assembly */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used in the assembly */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library used in the assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly the class belongs to */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of the class (e.g., public, private, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the method belongs to */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of the method (e.g., constructor, destructor, etc.) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method the issue belongs to */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the issue */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Problem ID associated with the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the issue (e.g., security, performance, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remediations" (
  "remediation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remediation plan */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the remediation plan belongs to */,
  "remediation_steps" TEXT /* Steps to remediate the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the remediation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the remediation (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("remediation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remediations_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "remediation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the remediation plan the assignment belongs to */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the remediation task */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was made */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_remediation_id FOREIGN KEY ("remediation_id") REFERENCES remediations ("remediation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assembly being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer conducting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_assembly_id FOREIGN KEY ("assembly_id") REFERENCES assemblies ("assembly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remediation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "remediation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the remediation plan */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remediation_comments_remediation_id FOREIGN KEY ("remediation_id") REFERENCES remediations ("remediation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remediation_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
